description: Configure GPredict for a Manhattan-based operator facing severe urban canyon horizon blockage. Establish a ground station named 'Manhattan_Urban' (40.7580 N, 73.9855 W, 50m altitude) and set it as the default. Clean up the configuration by deleting the 'Pittsburgh' ground station and 'Amateur' module. Create a tracking module named 'High_Passes' using the 'Manhattan_Urban' ground station, including satellites SO-50 (27607), AO-73 (39444), AO-85 (40967), and ISS (25544). Update the global pass prediction preferences to a minimum elevation of 45 degrees. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
